manifest.author: Alex Kurowski
manifest.name: Solo RPG Toolkit
manifest.description: Random generator tools geared towards solo TTRPG gameplay

manifest.author: Roberto Bisceglie
manifest.name: Solo TTRPG Notation
manifest.description: A plugin for recording and tracking solo tabletop RPG sessions using a standardized notation system.

manifest.author: Liam Riddell
manifest.name: Solve
manifest.description: Supercharge your notes with real-time calculations without AI fuss. From dates ('Now + 20 days'), percentages ('10% of 120'), units of measurement ('100cm + 2m'), arithmetic ('10 + 5') and more!

manifest.author: wesswart77
manifest.name: Songwriter
manifest.description: A songwriter's notebook: lyrics, chords, song structure, themes, influences, and recording notes.

manifest.author: ohyoungpark
manifest.name: Sonkil
manifest.description: Provides Emacs-style text operations like Kill/Yank (Kill Ring), multi-cursor editing, and visual mark selection.

manifest.author: Kanzi
manifest.name: Sort Frontmatter
manifest.description: Sort frontmatter recursively

manifest.author: Ninjalope
manifest.name: Sortable File Explorer
manifest.description: Alternative file explorer with custom sorting and drag & drop.

manifest.author: filippov112
manifest.name: Sortable Tables
manifest.description: Adds sortable columns to markdown tables in preview mode.

manifest.author: João Gradim
manifest.name: Soundboard
manifest.description: Play audio files from your vault in a soundboard.

manifest.author: Solomonarul
manifest.name: Soundify
manifest.description: Allows for sounds to play on specific events.

manifest.author: Andrew McGivery
manifest.name: Soundscapes
manifest.description: Adds a music/ambiance (E.g. lofi, white noise) player to the status bar to help with concentration. Also allows you to play your own local music files.

manifest.author: Waiting
manifest.name: Source Code Note
manifest.description: This plugin can help you organize source code note easily.

manifest.author: Gerrie Myburgh
manifest.name: Source Scanner
manifest.description: Scan text source for comments then place it in vault as text files.

manifest.author: Chris Howard
manifest.name: Source Mode Styling
manifest.description: Provides a customisable raw look in source mode using a monospace font to clearly differentiate from Live Preview.

manifest.author: Zach Mueller
manifest.name: Spaced everything
manifest.description: Apply spaced repetition algorithms to everything in your vault.

manifest.author: Belinda Mo, Athena Leong
manifest.name: Spaced Repetition AI
manifest.description: Review, generate, and add flashcards for your notes using AI

manifest.author: dralkh
manifest.name: Spaceforge
manifest.description: Enhance knowledge retention with spaced repetition using FSRS & SM-2 algorithms, AI-powered MCQ generation, integrated Pomodoro timer, and calendar event manager.

manifest.author: Jared Lumpe
manifest.name: Spacekeys
manifest.description: Define hotkeys based on sequences of keypresses.

manifest.author: CrossGenAI
manifest.name: Spark Assistant
manifest.description: AI-powered automation with slash commands, chat widget, and intelligent workflows.

manifest.author: Dinu Gherman
manifest.name: Sparklines
manifest.description: Render inline sparklines, converting code blocks to SVG.

manifest.author: Neurahex (Heni Wael)
manifest.name: SpeakNote
manifest.description: Record voice notes and auto-transcribe them to markdown using Deepgram, AssemblyAI, or OpenAI Whisper.

manifest.author: Forketyfork
manifest.name: Speech Bubbles
manifest.description: Renders transcription notes as message app style speech bubbles, similar to Apple Messages.

manifest.author: Taesun Lee
manifest.name: Speech to Text
manifest.description: Convert audio recordings to text using multiple AI providers (OpenAI Whisper, Deepgram).

manifest.author: mwoz123
manifest.name: Speech To Text Keyboard Helper
manifest.description: Makes available helper commands for Speech to Text (Google Andoroid) keyboard in Obsidian command pallete (and from there could be added to e.g. mobile buttons toolbar).

manifest.author: Madhusudan Kulkarni
manifest.name: Speed Reader
manifest.description: RSVP-based speed reading for your notes - flash one word at a time with optimal recognition point highlighting.

manifest.author: Julian Szachowicz
manifest.name: Spellcheck Toggler
manifest.description: Toggle spellchecking for types of text blocks in the editing view.

manifest.author: Antonio Henrique
manifest.name: The Spirit's Book
manifest.description: Plugin to study and explore *The Spirit's Book* by Allan Kardec, directly within your vault.

manifest.author: xIYuE
manifest.name: Split Web Viewer Modifier
manifest.description: Open external links in a split-pane Web Viewer. Supports reuse, new tab, new split, and browser modes. Configurable Shift / Cmd/Ctrl click behavior.

manifest.author: AllJavi
manifest.name: Spoiler Block
manifest.description: Create Spoiler Blocks to hide information until you want to see it

manifest.author: Jacobtread
manifest.name: Spoilers
manifest.description: Hide and reveal blocks of information

manifest.name: Spotify API

manifest.author: Studio Webux
manifest.name: Spotify Link

manifest.author: Dillon Cutaiar

manifest.description: Insert a link to the song currently playing on your Spotify

manifest.name: Spotify Sorter

manifest.author: Divam Gupta
manifest.name: Spreadsheets
